fields.description: Pick FAQs from the FAQ collection. Order here is overridden by each FAQ's Sort Order if set.

defaultItem.label: YOU ARE DOING THE RIGHT THING AT THE RIGHT PLACE
defaultItem.headline: We help you understand your brain, reduce your risk, and take action early through advanced assessment, clinical insight, and ongoing personalized care.
defaultItem.secondHeadline: Brain health today is reactive, fragmented, and often imprecise. PBH is built for what comes next.
defaultItem.thirdHeadline: Move at your own pace, with expert guidance available when you want it.

fields.name: label
fields.label: Eyebrow Label (first)
fields.description: Shown as the animation begins (progress 0 → ~0.33)

fields.name: secondLabel
fields.label: Eyebrow Label (second)
fields.description: Shown during the middle third (progress ~0.33 → ~0.66)

fields.name: thirdLabel
fields.label: Eyebrow Label (third)
fields.description: Shown in the final third (progress ~0.66 → 1)

fields.name: image
fields.label: Background image (left card)
fields.description: Image displayed behind the headline. If empty, a dark color is used as placeholder.

fields.name: video
fields.label: Background video (left card, overrides image)
fields.description: Path to a video file in /public (e.g. /videos/man-sitting-on-bench.mp4). Plays muted on loop. Takes precedence over the image.

fields.name: icon
fields.label: Phosphor icon name
fields.description: Name of a Phosphor icon (e.g. Brain, FlowerLotus, CalendarHeart). See https://phosphoricons.com for the full set.

fields.name: video
fields.label: Video URL
fields.description: Path to a video file in /public (e.g. /videos/intro.mp4). Plays in a modal when the play button is clicked.

fields.name: poster
fields.label: Poster Image
fields.description: Still shown in the centered card before play

fields.name: leftImage
fields.label: Left Decorative Image
fields.description: Decorative image peeking out behind the video on the left

fields.name: rightImage
fields.label: Right Decorative Image
fields.description: Decorative image peeking out behind the video on the right

fields.description: Show on homepage or featured section
